rows.dau_bao: LED Trang Tien Plaza, Ha Noi (Phoenix)
rows.vi_tri: mat ngoai Trang Tien Plaza
rows.ghi_chu: trung gia voi Unique OOH - dung de doi chieu

ncc_chinh: Unique OOH (quangcaongoaitroi.com) - bang gia cong khai chi tiet nhat: ~90 vi tri LED toan quoc + don gia LCD/Frame thang may theo tuan
Trimai.vn - don gia thang may DP/LCD theo mien + goi combo 150-500 man
Tindi Media - don gia DP/LCD thang may theo mien (re hon Trimai ~15%)
Phoenix Media (quangcaophoenix.com) - bang gia LED trung khop Unique OOH (co the cung nguon)
Brandcom.vn - danh sach vi tri chi tiet (kich thuoc, tan suat, traffic) nhung gia phai lien he/anh
HCOM - gia 'tu' theo loai dia diem, thap bat thuong (co the la gia thue man hinh tu so huu, khong phai booking spot)
meta.ghi_chu_thi_truong: LED ngoai troi toa nha o HN/HCM: pho bien 72-384 trieu/thang (TVC 30s, 120 spot/ngay, book toi thieu 1 thang, chua VAT); vi tri dat nhat Trang Tien Plaza 672 trieu/thang. Tinh le: 60-240 trieu/thang. LED indoor TTTM: 120-372 trieu/thang. Thang may: gia chuan hoa theo man/tuan - Frame cabin 1.55-2.48 trieu/man/tuan (360 spot/ngay), LCD sanh cho 372k-870k/man/tuan (72 spot/ngay), TVC 30s tinh gap doi 15s; mua thuong theo combo 100-500 man x so tuan. Nhieu NCC (Brandcom, SSM, adsngoaitroi) giau gia sau anh/Google Sheets - muon gia chi tiet tung toa nha phai xin file bao gia. Gia giua cac dai ly trung nhau nhieu (cung chu man hinh goc), markup ban lai nen dua tren gia Unique OOH lam chuan.
